title: leucorchis albida f. subalpina
intro: Leucorchis albida f. subalpina, also known as the mountain white orchid, is a rare and endemic orchid species found in certain regions of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leucorchis albida f. subalpina are said to include its potential to reduce fever, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
